  • Code of Conduct

Telepresence

We will provide two OhmniLabs telepresence robots for attending ICAPS 2017 remotely.

The robots will be available for the following events:
  • Invited talks
  • All main conference sessions
  • Tutorials
  • Workshops
  • Community meeting

No cost will be associated with the use of the robots. Since we only have two robots, we ask people to please express a real interest in each slot they indicate during the registration process.

Please USE THIS FORM to register. Registration closes at the end of June 11, 2017.

ICAPS is the premier forum for exchanging news and research results on theory and applications of intelligent planning and scheduling technology.

© 2022 ICAPS
